So a couple things, the theme for today we're going to be going through is the funnel. So I'm going to be sharing a couple things this morning. We're going to do a couple cool things and then after lunch, Stephen's going to come up and we're actually going to be opening up some of the funnels and building it. But what I want to share today this morning just to kind of get your minds thinking. So when I first, so I learned this whole process from being a stage seller, right? Sitting on stage, traveling on the country and doing that. And then after like three years of it, I was actually in the Boise airport. It was like one o'clock in the morning. I was flying out somewhere and I'm sitting there in the airport all by myself and I was sitting there on my phone depressed and I was like, this sucks really bad. I'm like my wife, I just had twins the time like my wife, my kids are home. I'm flying out again to go someplace a bunch of people I don't want to hang out with to go do a thing which is fun and then go back to the hotel room and sit there for like another you know, 18 hours and fly back home. And I was like, I don't want this for my life anymore. So I texted my wife one the morning I said, I'm quitting speaking. This is my last time that you go back. Yeah, right. Love you. See you in a couple of days. And so then my mind, the whole rest of that trip was like, how do I stop speaking and traveling? I don't want to keep doing that. So then it started transitioning to like, well, how can I do this more and more online? So the time in the tele-seminars is a big thing. So we're doing a tele-seminars and then webinars came and I got better and better at doing it on webinars. For me, that was the only way it kind of worked was just webinars, right? And the pitch and everything we went through yesterday was something that's been evolving for the last 10 years for me. And it's kind of like the point where now it's like there's always little things were changing, but it pretty much works. That's why we call it the perfect webinar. It's perfect. In fact, I've had probably four or five of you guys who like, I did the perfect webinar. It didn't work. I'm like, oh, why not? And then they show me and like, well, I changed this and I tweaked this. And I'm like, are you telling me I give you something called the perfect webinar? It's perfect. And then you changed it. Like, anyway, so it's just perfect. It works. Like in every market, like we've ever tried it in. So, but recently over the last, probably year and a half to two years or so, and the first time it happened out of kind of a fluke, I was one of my friends, Mike Phil, same to me as no one. He was launching a new product and he wanted us to promote it. And I wasn't going to, but he's like, when I first got started, he's like my first friend. We got started at the same time. And for the last like 12 years, like, he's been like my closest friend in this whole business. He's like, I really need your help, man. We're trying to do this thing. And he's like, we're doing an affiliate contest and the winner gets a BMW and this whole thing, right? And then I'm like, Mike, I don't want to promote. I don't have time. We're doing all this other stuff. And anyway, so kind of left it at that. And then he did the launch and people were coming and there's leaderboards and everyone's fighting and all this stuff's happening. And he's like, man, you got to help. You got to help. And I'm like, do you ever know what's already promoted it? Like it's kind of too late. And then, and then I think it was like three, three or four days left in the launch before it ended. And he's like, dude, what's going to take? Like just do something. Like, and finally I'm like, all right, I'll do that. But there's only one condition. I was like, I don't really want a BMW. But BMW costs, I think about $50,000 when he had. I'm like, I do want a cryosana, which is $50,000. If I win, will you buy me a cryosana instead of a, instead of a BMW? He's like, dude, you are so weird. And I'm like, he's like, what is it? I'm like, showing the pictures. He's like, so what do you do? I'm like, you get in it and you freeze yourself for like three minutes. It's really cool. And like, he's anyway, he's like, whatever. If you win, I'll give you that fine. I'm like, cool. So then I was like, okay, well, I got to promote this, but everyone in their dogs are going to promote the same for the last like three or four weeks. Like everyone I know has already bought it. Like how am I going to come and compete in this short period of time? And I was like, oh, I'm going to do a webinar. So I had this thought. I'm going to write a webinar. But then I got to the office and like the day went on. There's like so much stuff happening and it takes for me, you know, a couple of days to like really do a good webinar. And finally I was like, I just like, I don't have time to do it. And he can't message me. Oh, yeah, you got to help me. I was like, okay, I got 48 hours left. He's like, come on, man, help me find. I was like, go. And then I had this like pop in my head. I was like, what if instead of like doing all the slides, what if I just opened up Facebook live and I just did a webinar like off the top of my head and just see what happens? I was like, that's like the only shot I had left. So I'm like, okay. So I sat down in front of a whiteboard. Here's a picture of it. And I was like, okay, what's, what's my one thing? And so he was selling automated webinar software. So this is like, this is not perfect. This was with like three minutes of prep time. So it's pretty dang good. So I was like, okay, what's the one thing I didn't even believe? I didn't even believe that the webinars are the future. So how to make that sexy? How to make at least, I think it's how to make at least eight figures a year without, with this new webinar model. So I'm like, okay, so I wrote that on the whiteboard. I doesn't know one thing. What are my three secrets? Okay. What's their, what's their fear about that? And I wrote down secret number one. I wrote down that. He was there, their internal fears. And okay, and secret number two, I wrote that down, wrote that down. I said, okay, if they buy for me for someone else, what should I give them? I'm like, okay, here's my offer. I wrote down this and I wrote down all those things there. And then I took a little piece of white paper and I like covered up each of these, each of those little things. Melon is like cutting paper and taping him in the back and we're like taping him up. And then within like five, 10 minutes, right? Okay, we got the webinar. And I was like, I can't remember if it was Brent, whoever had it. Like we had one phone on Facebook live, one was on Periscope and they stood there and they went click and they started it. I talked about it. Secret number two and I talked about it. Secret number three. And if you sign up right now, you're gonna get, and I pulled off the thing, you're gonna get this, and you're gonna get this. And I did the whole stack and whole everything. I think it'd be in 26 minutes and like 32 seconds was my entire time and it ended. And I was like, whoo, am I, dang. I was like, did anybody buy it? And then they, I don't know, it's logging in, it's logging the Philly account and sales are like, doon, doon, doon, doon, doon. And so then John jumps on and he's like, man, sales are coming like crazy. So he started boosting it and over the next like 48 hours, we had over 150,000, 160,000 people watch this. We figured it out now. Do you want me to talk about the next one? This is the... So it's like every time we launch anything now, we just do a Facebook live in our group if it's like a hot, like it's a product for like our group. Like instead of sending an email and getting into webinar, like we push everyone who signs up for our program into our group and then we do a live in the group. So like we use it for everything now because it's just like the fastest delivery mechanism to like give the best pitch because you just can't do that over an email, you know? And then... This webinar now, this Facebook live has like 1.5 million views on Facebook. So I just think like how much money you'd have to spend on like lead gen and like on a regular funnel to get a million and a half people to like watch your webinar. And I think we did like over a half a million dollars with the last one. That's running right now. And that was in like three weeks, I think. It was crazy. Yes. All right. So the first one we did like our core offer, then we launched this like $27 product and we did like 150 grand with a $27 product on this live just because you can reach so many people. And then the third, the last time we did it was in November and that was when we did the half a million on it. And then we just have a new one that's running right now. That's just consistently every single day because it's like you do the webinar and you crush it and it works. And then you literally can just perpetuate it and like automated webinar just by running the ad. Let me say something. Okay. So the first Facebook live webinar is this. I'm in the community and I'm like, hey, lady bosses, like I know that it's changed your life so much and you guys love being a lady boss. There's so many more women out there that we could help. So today I'm going to do a Facebook live at one o'clock Eastern time and I would love for you to be on a share testimony. So the first thing I do when I start that Facebook live is I say, where are my lady bosses at? Like if you've had a transformation, post it in the comments below and tell everybody like what it means to you to be a lady boss. And it's just flooded with social proof of the program. So like they're sold before I even get to the stack. Yeah. Like cause literally you have your entire like user base singing your praises and answering questions for and like sitting it. Cause you know, when you watch a live video, you're just like watching the comment scroll, right? And so you have your entire user base just like singing your praises while you're pitching your product and they're all like, it works. It works. It works. It works. It works. It works. Well, like, yes, yeah. Right. And it's what we know and believes what you say about yourself, but when you have all those people on there, it's like, so, so that just like set a date and then tell them. And then, and then you literally can perpetuate that the thing also that like, once you get it going, I know this is kind of like, but I mean, it's not hard to just set it up. If you already have a webinar, you can just do it live. But once you get it going, and I just literally figured this out yesterday is like for some reason our cost of acquisition kept going up over like the last couple of weeks and I couldn't figure it out. And I, because the way you set it on Facebook is you set top comments to show up and then you comment on all the best testimonies and they roll to the top, right? Like you do that on your ads anyway. But like what I realized is that when people watch the live and they pull it full screen, like they see the ad, they click it, they watch it, it'll insert the comments of people like afterwards at any point, like whatever point during the live stream they watched it, it puts their comment. And so we just had a bunch of hater comments. So basically you just sit there, you click it on like live comments and then you watch them and we deleted 700 negative comments. And the cost of acquisition went from $90 to $50. And so hopefully it gets better because we just started. Yeah, so this is like, you know, this is weeks after it's been running because it's just on auto right now and like literally cut the conversion cost in half because like you just delete all the hater comments out of it because that influence of what they're reading while they're watching you and what everyone else is saying is like the reason they buy I think. So I have an ad guy so I just told him to go through and delete it. I think it took him like two hours but like, it was like if it's bad, delete it. And just the comment moderation, yeah. So it's amazing. That cool guy? Yes, I'm... I think the coolest part about that whole thing is in fact, I mean we talk all the time about webinars being $1,000, $497 to $29.97. It's a $147 product.
